products.name: Josh 4T Plus 20W-40
products.description: Bosch Josh 4T API SL 20W-40. Reliable protection for daily use and smooth clutch operation and engine performance. BS6 compliant for modern motorcycles.

products.name: Splendid 4T Plus 20W-40
products.description: HP RACER SPLENDID+ 20W-40 grade is the premium quality motorcycle engine oil made to cater to the highly demanding lubrication requirements of modern 4-Stroke geared bikes. Manufactured from the finest Group II base stocks and state of art additive technology to meet API SL and JASO MA2 requirements.

products.name: 3000 4T Plus 20W-40
products.description: Fuel economy, continuous protection of engine and gearbox. Keeps engine clean with lesser carbon deposits leading to lesser wear. Stable wet clutch performance under stop-and-go ride conditions. Prolong emission control system for BS VI. Shear stable for continuous protection and power.
